subcodes.first_line: The missive of your honor was received, and the sweet fragrance of love was wafted and diffused therefrom. God willing, from the rays of the Sun [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مکتوب آنجناب رسید و عرف محبت از او متضوع و منتشر انشاء الله از انوار آفتاب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement
